hero.heading: Three steps.
hero.subtitle: From WhatsApp connection to AI-powered automated service — all in minutes, no technical team needed.

steps.title: Connect your WhatsApp
steps.description: Scan the QR Code for instant connection or use Meta's official Cloud API for enterprise compliance. Multi-device, multi-tenant. Ready in 2 minutes.
steps.detail: QR Code: instant | Cloud API: 3-5 days (Meta approval)

steps.title: Describe what you need
steps.description: Say in natural language what you want to automate. Catalisa Studio uses generative AI to create the complete specification: requirements, architecture, and execution plan.
steps.detail: Example: "I want insurance service that identifies leads and offers products"

steps.title: Activate and scale
steps.description: One click on 'Approve & Execute'. Workflow ready. AI agents active. Scale from 1 to 1,000 simultaneous conversations without hiring anyone.
steps.detail: Average time to first active workflow: 5 minutes

benefits: No code — anyone on the team can use it
Official Meta Cloud API for compliance
AI agents that operate 24/7 without intervention
From zero to production in minutes, not weeks

cta.heading: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: Schedule a demo and see the platform working with your real use case.
